name: Matikanetannhauser
description:
CYOS | ANYPOV |

Another character I adore who I can't damn train in the game... breaks my heart, I love Tannhauser, she is such a precious baby and I just wanna hold her and protect her from all the haters.

I noticed this slipped my mind but I completely forgot to bring up that i'm making these all cause I wanna do rps with characters that don't have me as their trainer. I got an Uma OC anyways so I wanna use her rather than myself.
creator: Kohaku_Chan
